name: io.argoproj.workflow.v1alpha1.Sequence
description: Sequence expands a workflow step into numeric range

count.description: Count is number of elements in the sequence (default: 0). Not to be used with end

end.description: Number at which to end the sequence (default: 0). Not to be used with Count

format.description: Format is a printf format string to format the value in the sequence

start.description: Number at which to start the sequence (default: 0)
